---
title: "mlr3mbo Config"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    html-math-method: katex
---

```{r}
#| include: false

library(data.table)

archive = fread("archive.csv")
setorderv(archive, c("batch_nr", "mean_k"))
setcolorder(archive, c("batch_nr", "mean_k", "parameter"))
archive = archive[parameter != "lambda"]
```

# Optimization Path

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| column: page
tab = archive[, -c("raw_k", "raw_mean_best", "id", "n_na", "n", "iteration", "timestamp")]
tab = tab[parameter != "incumbent"][, tail(.SD, 1), by=batch_nr]

knitr::kable(tab, digits = 2)
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| column: page
tab = archive[batch_nr == 8, -c("raw_k", "raw_mean_best", "id", "n_na", "n", "iteration", "timestamp")]
knitr::kable(tab, digits = 2)
```

# Archive

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| column: page
tab = archive[, -c("raw_k", "raw_mean_best", "id", "n_na", "n", "iteration", "timestamp")]

knitr::kable(tab, digits = 2, row.names = TRUE)
```
